mnemonics.title: Fragmentation Types
mnemonics.content: HVD - Horizontal (rows), Vertical (columns), Derived (based on other relations)

mnemonics.title: CAP Theorem
mnemonics.content: CAP = Choose 2: Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance

acronyms.usage: Extended ACID properties for distributed transactions

visualTips.visualization: Imagine breaking a mirror into pieces - each shard reflects part of data

analogies.analogy: Like a franchise network - local stores (nodes) with central guidelines (schema)
